meaning: 里耶卡[南斯拉夫西北部港市](旧称阜姆
examples: The vessel was en route from Rijeka, Croatia, to Gioia Tauro, Italy. In Gioia Taura the damage to the vessel will be assessed and potential contingency plans for the cargo be carried out.
"The farce has ended" reads a headline in the Rijeka-based daily, Novi list.
Norac is wanted by the county court in Rijeka for questioning about his alleged involvement in the 1991 murder of Serb civilians.
He was born there, in the Adriatic seaport of Rijeka (now in Croatia), and took Italian nationality when the town was annexed by Mussolini's Italy in 1924 and renamed Fiume.
